preparation_detail: Citric acid complexing; metal ion:citric acid = 1:1.2; solution pH about 1.0; complex metal ions; prevent Mo precipitation; promote homogeneous gel; citric acid; metal ion:citric acid = 1:1.2; 1
calcination_condition: citrate precursor thermally decomposed in air at 700 °C for 2 h
activation_condition: ground to fine powder before thermal decomposition
phase_or_state_summary: separate MgMoO4/MgMo2O7/MoO3 phases observed; Fe mainly oxidized
dispersion_summary: non-uniform distribution and agglomerated catalyst particles
notes: Bracketed MgO-only support values from Table 1 were not entered as catalyst values.

preparation_detail: Citric acid complexing; metal ion:citric acid = 1:1.2; solution pH about 1.0; complex metal ions; prevent Mo precipitation; promote homogeneous gel; citric acid; metal ion:citric acid = 1:1.2; 1
calcination_condition: citrate precursor thermally decomposed in Ar at 500 sccm and 700 °C for 2 h
activation_condition: ground to fine powder before thermal decomposition
phase_or_state_summary: no separate Fe2O3 or MoOx phase detected; Fe-Mo nanoclusters dispersed in MgO
dispersion_summary: well-dispersed 3-6 nm Fe-Mo particles; Mo-rich clusters
notes: TEM-EDS spot ratio was Mo-rich, but it was not treated as the bulk catalyst composition.

preparation_detail: Citric acid complexing; metal ion:citric acid = 1:1.2; solution pH about 1.0; complex metal ions; prevent Mo precipitation; promote homogeneous gel; citric acid; metal ion:citric acid = 1:1.2; 1
calcination_condition: citrate precursor thermally decomposed in H2 at 500 sccm and 700 °C for 2 h
activation_condition: ground to fine powder before thermal decomposition
phase_or_state_summary: Fe-Mo nanoclusters dispersed in MgO; Mo2C phase observed under reducing decomposition
